$comment: EliOS roster. qi 2026-06-12 'make user names for now' — usernames generated on the trackingtogether.com brand domain so PROVISIONING RUNS NOW without waiting on 8 real Gmails. For NOW these are PASSWORD-AUTH logins (email = login identifier; does NOT need to receive mail). `cd elios/backend && SUPABASE_URL=... SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=... node scripts/provision-logins.mjs` admin-creates all 8 auth users, stamps role in user_metadata, generates a random temp password per user, prints them once (passwords NEVER stored in repo). Swap any email to a real Google address later to enable that user's Google OAuth / magic-link. DB role model + RLS come from supabase-schema.sql (assign_leads + all_leads). MASTERS see ALL leads + assign + manage roster + set block_value; SUBSCRIBERS see ONLY their assigned leads (RLS-scoped).
password_policy: provision-logins.mjs generates a 16-char random temp password per user at run time, prints once, flags must-change-on-first-login. Not committed.

model.master: Admin tier. Sees ALL leads + ALL grants. Assigns/unassigns leads to any subscriber. Manages the roster (sets roles), sets block_value.
model.subscriber: Sees ONLY the leads assigned to them (RLS-scoped via lead_grants/my_leads). No roster or cross-buyer visibility.
